meaning: British Thermal Unit ,英国热量单位
examples: The toughest issue for me was the BTU tax.
In the United States, heat is measured in British thermal units (Btu).
He is already the general engineer of this low BTU water gas project.
One BTU looks like any other when toted up in the government's energy accounts.
The oldest gas plants burn as much as 13, 000 Btu, and the national average is 10, 500.
